metadata.title: Quality Control | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Advanced quality control solution - detect defects easily, manage inspections, and keep production running.

header.title: Quality
header.subtitle: without the complexity
header.description: Build smart quality checks, catch defects early, manage inspections, and keep production moving without adding unnecessary complexity.

worksWithProcess.title: Works with your process
worksWithProcess.description: Add quality checks inside manufacturing, inventory, and delivery operations without slowing your team.

centralizeInspections.title: Centralize inspections
centralizeInspections.description: Create control points, quality alerts, corrective actions, and inspection history in one place.

kanbanView.title: Kanban view
kanbanView.description: Manage quality alerts by status using a clean drag-and-drop workflow.

orderIntegration.title: Order integration
orderIntegration.description: Trigger checks directly from manufacturing orders, transfers, receipts, and deliveries.

section1.title: Quality
section1.subtitle: inspections
section1.descriptionText: Maintain product consistency and quality by configuring checks directly on manufacturing orders, work centers, receipts, and delivery flows.

qualityAlert.title: Quality Alert
qualityAlert.correctiveActionText: Block the faulty batch, notify supplier, and re-check components before production continues.

section3.title: No product
section3.subtitle: left unchecked

inspectionWorksheet.title: Inspection worksheet
inspectionWorksheet.operatorNoteText: Add measurement, attach image, and validate the inspection.

section3.descriptionText: Choose product-specific checks and inspection worksheets. Track photos, measurements, pass/fail answers, and comments for every important operation.

section4.title: Put your
section4.subtitle: quality
section4.descriptionText: Create unlimited quality teams dedicated to specific products, operations, or issues. Assign alerts and make sure every concern reaches the right person.

qualityStats.title: Quality statistics
qualityStats.description: Track defects, inspections, teams, and corrective actions with easy-to-read reporting.

testimonialSection.joinSubtitle: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.text: Quality checks became easier to follow, and our teams now catch issues before they reach customers.
testimonial.name: Robert Hayes
